message:
fix: agent registry cache invalidation and setup hook timeout

config/agents.go: don't cache non-existent registry paths as loaded —
the file may be created later and needs to be picked up on next load.

rig/setuphooks.go: use exec.CommandContext with 60s timeout so a hung
setup hook can't block CLI indefinitely.

Closes gt-tlk2j, gt-ufi0c

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
